text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fan letter arrives for Yaeno Muteki. I give it to
her when I see her at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Fan letters encapsulate the devotion of those
who support me. They must be read with the
utmost care and respect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking solemn, Yaeno Muteki opens the letter
and begins reading.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Nooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki suddenly lets out a shout... and
then runs from the room!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I chase her to the rooftop, where I find her
furiously striking the air with her fists.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Haaa! Seeei! Kyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...
choice_data_list: The letter didn't say anything mean, did it?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Not at all! The exact opposite!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The sender is a student of the Kongo Yaegaki
style, just as I am.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The reason I chose the path of racing was because
my master instructed me to do so. But, as you'd
expect, not all of my fellow students agreed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Why are you doing this?! You said we were gonna dedicate ourselves to martial arts together! You're a big liar, Yae!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There's no denying that I broke the promise I
made to her. I've dedicated myself to a routine of
stringent training to ensure I don't forget that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But in her letter, she said...

text_block_list.name: Letter from Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I was so angry with you for the longest time. I
thought you'd just run away from martial arts to
do your own thing, leaving me behind.

text_block_list.name: Letter from Classmate
text_block_list.text:
But when I saw you running on TV, I realized
something. You're still walking your path with
honor.

text_block_list.name: Letter from Classmate
text_block_list.text:
As Adept once said, "It is not enough to simply
accept the comings and goings of others. You
must greet them with warmth and see them off
with kindness."

text_block_list.name: Letter from Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for saying such awful things to you
before. I know it might be too late, but I want you
to have a warm goodbye from me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I am... struggling to find the words to express my
feelings.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So I shall let my emotions burst forth from my
fists, ride the winds, race through the heavens,
and find their way to you, my friend!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having received a letter from an old friend,
Yaeno Muteki renews her vow to push ahead
down the path of racing.
